title: DOORS Mod
body:
The DOORS is a java 1.19.2 mod based on the popular roblox game, doors. This mod includes entities from the horror game, such as Rush, Ambush, Halt, And Seek. There is a crucifix item you can use as a melee weapon. Some entities drop items too! If you are looking for a challenge, maybe a bit of fear, you will surely love this mod!

There are too many features to list, so I will name a few:

Rush  
Crucifix  
Ambush  
Figure  
Seek  
Eyes  
Dupe  
A-60  
A-90  
A-120

And SO much more!

THIS MOD WILL NOT GET ANY MORE UPDATES!
